title: Coverage Tracker Demo Book
text:
1 Welcome
This sample Quarto book demonstrates section-level course coverage tracking.

title: Coverage Tracker Demo Book
text:
1.1 How to use this sample
Use the dropdown to pick a section as a student. Add ?prof (or ?prof=true) to the URL to enable professor mode and select sections with checkboxes.

title: Coverage Tracker Demo Book
text:
1.2 Reading plan
In this sample, some sections are marked as covered for one section and not the other so you can observe different highlighting states.

title: Coverage Tracker Demo Book
text:
1.3 Course goals
These learning goals apply to every section in the sample.

title: Coverage Tracker Demo Book
text:
1.4 Prerequisites
Review algebra and trigonometry before the chapters on calculus topics.

title: 2  Chapter 1
text:
2.1 Limits review
This section is covered in both demo sections.

title: 2  Chapter 1
text:
2.2 Continuity basics
This section is only covered in section 01.

title: 2  Chapter 1
text:
2.3 Derivatives preview
This section is only covered in section 02.

title: 2  Chapter 1
text:
2.4 Applications
Short applied examples tie the definitions to word problems.

title: 3  Chapter 2
text:
3.1 Integration intro
Antiderivatives and the idea of accumulation appear throughout this chapter.

title: 3  Chapter 2
text:
3.2 Series topics
Sequences and series give a different lens on representing functions.

title: 3  Chapter 2
text:
3.3 Applications in physics
Motion and work examples connect integrals to measurable quantities.
